synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-28017 Oracle Linux 8 leapp-repository bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28017
description:
[0.20.0-2.0.28]
- Implemented versionlock inhibitor [Orabug: 38645486]
- Implemented fix for not enough space error message [Orabug: 35406933]

[0.20.0-2.0.27]
- Update aarch64 problematic package list [Orabug: 38658490]
- Support OL9.7 as a target upgrade path [Orabug: 38640752]

[0.20.0-2.0.25]
- Add additional mappings for OL9 upgrade [Orabug: 38640419]
- Add additional problematic i686 package [Orabug: 38544332]
- Update supported RHCK version [Orabug: 38640727]
- Add mappings for mysql 8.4 stream [Orabug: 38644271]

[0.20.0-2.0.24]
- Import special selinux module for double upgrade case [Orabug: 38285113]

[0.20.0-2.0.23]
- Implement support and mapping for UEKR8 repository [JIRA: LEAPP-3]

[0.20.0-2.0.22]
- Set Oracle Linux 9.6 as upgrade target [Orabug: 37839808]
- Add alert for problematic aarch64 package [Orabug: 37953148]

[0.20.0-2.0.21]
- Produce alert on additional i686 problematic packages [Orabug: 37792372] [Orabug: 37809864]
- Add additional mappings for OL9 upgrade [Orabug: 37792090] [Orabug: 37803309]

[0.20.0-2.0.20]
- Pre-set enabled repos variable [JIRA: OLDIS-43582], [JIRA: OLDIS-43583]

[0.20.0-2.0.19]
- Update conditions for OSMH upgrade [JIRA: OLDIS-43582], [JIRA: OLDIS-43583]

[0.20.0-2.0.18]
- Implemented Inhibitor for Oracle-ebs-server-R12-Preinstall [Orabug: 37096058]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28017

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28017.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-0.20.0-2.0.28.el8.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-deps-0.20.0-2.0.28.el8.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-0.20.0-2.0.28.el8.noarch.rpm
leapp-upgrade-el8toel9-deps-0.20.0-2.0.28.el8.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/leapp-repository-0.20.0-2.0.28.el8.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[0.20.0-2.0.28]
- Implemented versionlock inhibitor [Orabug: 38645486]
- Implemented fix for not enough space error message [Orabug: 35406933]

[0.20.0-2.0.27]
- Update aarch64 problematic package list [Orabug: 38658490]
- Support OL9.7 as a target upgrade path [Orabug: 38640752]

[0.20.0-2.0.25]
- Add additional mappings for OL9 upgrade [Orabug: 38640419]
- Add additional problematic i686 package [Orabug: 38544332]
- Update supported RHCK version [Orabug: 38640727]
- Add mappings for mysql 8.4 stream [Orabug: 38644271]

[0.20.0-2.0.24]
- Import special selinux module for double upgrade case [Orabug: 38285113]

[0.20.0-2.0.23]
- Implement support and mapping for UEKR8 repository [JIRA: LEAPP-3]

[0.20.0-2.0.22]
- Set Oracle Linux 9.6 as upgrade target [Orabug: 37839808]
- Add alert for problematic aarch64 package [Orabug: 37953148]

[0.20.0-2.0.21]
- Produce alert on additional i686 problematic packages [Orabug: 37792372] [Orabug: 37809864]
- Add additional mappings for OL9 upgrade [Orabug: 37792090] [Orabug: 37803309]

[0.20.0-2.0.20]
- Pre-set enabled repos variable [JIRA: OLDIS-43582], [JIRA: OLDIS-43583]

[0.20.0-2.0.19]
- Update conditions for OSMH upgrade [JIRA: OLDIS-43582], [JIRA: OLDIS-43583]

[0.20.0-2.0.18]
- Implemented Inhibitor for Oracle-ebs-server-R12-Preinstall [Orabug: 37096058]
